options.text: I love coffee! Can I try some later?
That’s nice. I like tea better.

content.situation: 你被朋友带到他的公寓，朋友指着厨房说：'This is the kitchen—I make coffee here every morning.' 你希望回应得自然且礼貌。
content.explanation: 正确答案用积极回应并表达兴趣（I love coffee! Can I try some later?），既认可了对方的分享，又延续了对话。干扰项2虽礼貌但转移了话题（偏好茶），干扰项3是无关提问，干扰项4过于冷淡，缺乏社交回应。
content.speakerText: This is the kitchen—I make coffee here every morning.
content.speakerTextCn: 这是厨房——我每天早上都在这儿煮咖啡。

options.text: Hi Mark, nice to meet you! Long-time roommates are rare!
Wow, you must argue a lot.

content.situation: 朋友带你进卧室，说：'This is my bedroom—this is where I sleep and watch movies on weekends.' 旁边站着他的室友，朋友介绍道：'This is Mark—he’s been my roommate for three years.' 你该如何回应？
content.explanation: 正确答案用标准社交用语 'nice to meet you' 并补充一句积极评论，既礼貌又自然。干扰项1是负面假设（争吵），干扰项3是无关提问，干扰项4过于简短，缺乏社交温度。
content.speakerText: This is Mark—he’s been my roommate for three years.
content.speakerTextCn: 这是Mark，他当了我三年室友。

options.text: It’s so peaceful here! What kind of books do you like?
Do you have a grill here?

content.situation: 朋友带你参观阳台，说：'This is my favorite spot—I read here every evening.' 你希望表达欣赏并参与对话。
content.explanation: 正确答案既赞美了环境（It’s so peaceful here!），又通过提问延续对话，符合社交互动原则。干扰项1是消极自我陈述，干扰项3是完全无关的问题，干扰项4过于敷衍，缺乏互动性。
content.speakerText: This is my favorite spot—I read here every evening.
content.speakerTextCn: 这是我最喜欢的地方——我每晚都在这儿看书。
